items.name: AUREIX - Vibrant Visionary Graphic Tee
items.description:
The shirt showcases a vivid, stylized portrait of a bearded figure, adorned with colorful hair clips and a striking red star over the eye. Hand-drawn elements like sunbursts and a playful cloud add a whimsical, artistic touch. The name "AUREIX" is rendered in a multi-colored, distressed graffiti style, with a small "CERTAIN FANS" stamp detail at the bottom left.
Style & Fit: Designed for a relaxed, boxy fit with slightly dropped shoulders, this premium tee is a unique blend of high-art and street culture. It’s an essential piece for anyone looking to make a vibrant, artistic statement.

Release: 2025 | AUREIX ORIGINAL

items.name: Wrapped Candy Head
items.description: Satisfy your sweet cravings with the Wrapped Candy Head! This fun accessory transforms your avatar’s head into a brightly colored candy, perfectly wrapped and ready to go. With its shiny wrapper crinkled at the ends, this treat brings a playful and whimsical touch to your look. Whether you’re exploring or showing off your sweet style, the Wrapped Candy Head is sure to add some sugar-coated fun to your Roblox adventures. Just try not to unwrap it too soon!

items.name: Locust Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Bring a sinister little companion to your avatar with the Locust Shoulder Pet, inspired by ancient swarm legends and eerie insect spirits whispered about in forgotten ruins.

Whether you’re building a dark sorcerer look, cursed wanderer outfit, post-apocalypse survivor, or creepy-cute collector style, this detailed shoulder companion adds a mysterious presence that people notice instantly.

⚡ Why this shoulder pet stands out:
✅ High-detail 3D locust with realistic texture
✅ Fits naturally on your shoulder with most outfits
✅Perfect for cursed, dark fantasy, swarm, or anime-inspired avatar styles
✅ Show love to the Locust crew & creator

Some say it follows powerful hosts… others say it chooses them.
Add your swarm companion today before it disappears into the wind.
